list.name: Changes
list.comment:
feat(admin): implement dynamic admin dashboard components and enhance UI
- Introduced reusable chart components (`ChartContainer`, `ChartTooltipContent`, etc.) for admin dashboard. - Implemented new charts: `QueryVolumeChart`, `DailyActivityChart`, and `DocumentStatusDistributionChart` for usage metrics. - Added `InteractivePieChart` for interactive data visualization. - Created `RecentFeedbacksTable` to display admin feedback with improved UI semantics. - Developed a new `Select` component for enhanced dropdown functionality.

task.summary:
chore: add IDE config files, update fonts, and refine global styles formatting
- Introduced new `.idea` config files for project-specific settings. - Updated font assets and standardized typography tokens across the project. - Enhanced LogsPage for improved structure and markdown rendering. - Refined global styles and component variants for error handling and improved UX.

feat(admin): implement dynamic admin dashboard components and enhance UI
- Introduced reusable chart components (`ChartContainer`, `ChartTooltipContent`, etc.) for admin dashboard. - Implemented new charts: `QueryVolumeChart`, `DailyActivityChart`, and `DocumentStatusDistributionChart` for usage metrics. - Added `InteractivePieChart` for interactive data visualization. - Created `RecentFeedbacksTable` to display admin feedback with improved UI semantics. - Developed a new `Select` component for enhanced dropdown functionality.

MESSAGE.value:
chore: add IntelliJ IDEA configuration files and update logs page design with markdown support
- Added `.idea` folder for project-specific IDE settings. - Enhanced LogsPage component with improved markdown rendering and updated UI elements for better clarity. - Updated badge variants with new "error" style for consistent status indicators.

chore: add IDE config files, update fonts, and refine global styles formatting
- Introduced new `.idea` config files for project-specific settings. - Updated font assets and standardized typography tokens across the project. - Enhanced LogsPage for improved structure and markdown rendering. - Refined global styles and component variants for error handling and improved UX.

feat(admin): implement dynamic admin dashboard components and enhance UI
- Introduced reusable chart components (`ChartContainer`, `ChartTooltipContent`, etc.) for admin dashboard. - Implemented new charts: `QueryVolumeChart`, `DailyActivityChart`, and `DocumentStatusDistributionChart` for usage metrics. - Added `InteractivePieChart` for interactive data visualization. - Created `RecentFeedbacksTable` to display admin feedback with improved UI semantics. - Developed a new `Select` component for enhanced dropdown functionality.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
feat(admin): implement dynamic admin dashboard components and enhance UI
- Introduced reusable chart components (`ChartContainer`, `ChartTooltipContent`, etc.) for admin dashboard. - Implemented new charts: `QueryVolumeChart`, `DailyActivityChart`, and `DocumentStatusDistributionChart` for usage metrics. - Added `InteractivePieChart` for interactive data visualization. - Created `RecentFeedbacksTable` to display admin feedback with improved UI semantics. - Developed a new `Select` component for enhanced dropdown functionality.
